creator: Lena@lena.kiev.ua
text:
Regarding http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/143559 :
if you need a /usr/local/etc/mararc  for testing, you can use a simple one:

hide_disclaimer = "YES"
ipv4_bind_addresses = "127.0.0.1"
chroot_dir = "/usr/local/etc/maradns"
verbose_level = 0
recursive_acl = "127.0.0.1"
